layout_description:
Option: OPT-1
Slide description: TWO-COLUMN LAYOUT with equal-width vertical sections side by side, each representing a distinct service offering domain. The slide uses a clean, professional structure with generous padding and breathing room appropriate for the sparse content density. A full-width footer bar anchors the bottom of the slide with the partnership statement. The layout follows a left-to-right reading flow with clear visual hierarchy: slide title at top, two equal-weight service columns in the middle zone, and a summary statement at the bottom. Each column is visually independent but structurally aligned, with identical top and bottom edges. The design emphasizes clarity and balance, with whitespace used purposefully to create a confident, uncluttered presentation. No outer content container is used — the columns sit directly on the slide background with appropriate margins from all edges.

Blueprint:
  Orientation: left-to-right
  Regions: 3
  Allocation: [0.5, 0.5]

Containers:
  C0 (LEFT COLUMN — TECHNOLOGY PLATFORM): Left column representing the Technology Platform service domain. Positioned at the left half of the content zone, spanning from just below the title to just above the footer bar. Equal-peers relationship with the right column (split 1:1 horizontally). Vertical structure: icon badge at top, section header, subtitle descriptor, then bullet list content distributed evenly across remaining vertical space. Icon badge: small filled circle in brand accent color with white laptop/monitor icon centered inside, positioned at top-left of column with small margin. Section header 'TECHNOLOGY PLATFORM' in brand accent color, bold, all-caps or title case, left-aligned, positioned directly below the icon with a small vertical gap. Subtitle 'Cryptocurrency Analytics Capabilities' in body font, regular weight, brand text color, italic, left-aligned, positioned directly below the header with a small vertical gap. Bullet list content: six capability items rendered as native PowerPoint bullets with brand-color circle bullet markers, body font size, brand text color, left-aligned with appropriate left inset. Bullet items distributed evenly across remaining column height using flexGrow to prevent top-stacking. No background fill, no border, no container box — content sits directly on slide background. All text elements share the same left alignment edge. Dashed grey separator lines between major content sections (after subtitle, not after last bullet) to create visual rhythm without consuming vertical space.
  C1 (RIGHT COLUMN — CAPACITY BUILDING): Right column representing the Capacity Building service domain. Positioned at the right half of the content zone, spanning from just below the title to just above the footer bar. Equal-peers relationship with the left column (split 1:1 horizontally). Identical vertical structure to left column: icon badge at top, section header, subtitle descriptor, then bullet list content distributed evenly. Icon badge: small filled circle in brand accent color with white graduation cap icon centered inside, positioned at top-left of column with small margin. Section header 'CAPACITY BUILDING' in brand accent color, bold, all-caps or title case, left-aligned, positioned directly below the icon with a small vertical gap. Subtitle 'Training & Knowledge Transfer' in body font, regular weight, brand text color, italic, left-aligned, positioned directly below the header with a small vertical gap. Bullet list content: six training program items rendered as native PowerPoint bullets with brand-color circle bullet markers, body font size, brand text color, left-aligned with appropriate left inset. Bullet items distributed evenly across remaining column height using flexGrow to prevent top-stacking. No background fill, no border, no container box — content sits directly on slide background. All text elements share the same left alignment edge. Top and bottom edges of this column must align exactly with the left column to maintain horizontal row alignment. Dashed grey separator lines between major content sections (after subtitle, not after last bullet) to create visual rhythm.
  C2 (FOOTER BAR — PARTNERSHIP STATEMENT): Full-width footer bar anchoring the bottom of the slide. Positioned at the very bottom of the content zone with a visible gap above the two service columns. Spans the full horizontal width of the slide from left margin to right margin. Compact height — just tall enough to contain the partnership statement text with a small vertical inset (top and bottom padding). Filled rectangle with brand primary color or brand accent color fill, no border, slightly rounded corners for a softer professional feel. Text content: 'Log-term partnerships including support training and ability to adapt and provide solutions to emerging needs' rendered in white, body font, regular weight, horizontally centered and vertically centered within the bar. The footer provides visual closure to the slide and reinforces the long-term value proposition. No decorative elements or additional graphics — the colored bar itself provides the visual weight needed to balance the slide composition.

_reference_violations.description: C0 (LEFT COLUMN — TECHNOLOGY PLATFORM): text block occupies approximately 35-40% of container inner height. The bullet list content is severely under-filled with a massive empty band below the last bullet item ('Dashboards & analytics'). More than half the container is empty white/blue space.

C1 (RIGHT COLUMN — CAPACITY BUILDING): text block occupies approximately 35-40% of container inner height. The bullet list content is severely under-filled with a massive empty band below the last bullet item ('Case study workshops'). More than half the container is empty white/teal space.

_reference_critique:
C0 (LEFT COLUMN — TECHNOLOGY PLATFORM) and C1 (RIGHT COLUMN — CAPACITY BUILDING) both exhibit severe under-fill violations. In both containers, the text block (icon badge + header + subtitle + bullet list) occupies only ~35-40% of the container inner height, leaving more than half of each container as empty space below the last bullet item. This is a critical container fill ratio violation.

SVGSketcher must increase the body font size for the bullet list items in both C0 and C1. Current font size appears to be approximately 14-16pt. Increase to 20-22pt to fill at least 65% of the container inner height. Additionally, increase vertical spacing (line-height and paragraph spacing) between bullet items to distribute content more evenly across the available vertical space. The layout description explicitly calls for "bullet items distributed evenly across remaining column height using flexGrow to prevent top-stacking" — this requirement is not met in the current sketch.

Apply the same font size and spacing adjustments to both C0 and C1 to maintain within-slide uniformity. The icon badge, section header, and subtitle sizes appear appropriate and should remain unchanged; only the bullet list content needs vertical expansion.
